comments.comment_text:
'36 pings within a 2 m cell'
Is it a 2x2m bin size?
comments.response_text: it refers to a 2 m × 2 m bin size. We have updated the wording accordingly in Section 5.2 of the report.
comments.summary_ko: '36 pings within a 2 m cell' — 2x2m 빈 사이즈인지 확인.

comments.comment_text: Please add the color palette with min/max values
comments.response_text: Figure 7 has been updated to reflect your comments.
comments.summary_ko: 최소/최대값 포함 색상 팔레트 추가 필요.

comments.comment_text: Please confirm that the nterpretation is going to be part of the GIS delierable
comments.response_text: A screenshot of the obstruction feature class within the GDB has been included. Please refer to it to confirm the file path/location.
comments.summary_ko: 해석 결과가 GIS 납품물에 포함 예정인지 확인.

comments.comment_text:
The images exemples shown for the seabed features are not clear for the Bathymetry Windows.
The color palette shall be narrowed to the values within the visible window
(e.g. on ArcGIS: 'Stretch' type of symbology - DRA mode of visualisation (dynamic range adjustment)).
The color palette and min/max values should also be visible in the bathymetry Windows.
Could you add in transparency the hillshade or a grey scaled slope attribute (0°: white - 20°: black)?
This will help visualise the morphology.
Please put the scale in bold and add a white background.

For the displayed bathy and backscatter: if possible please change the display to smoothen the visible pixels.
This is easily done on ArcGIS pro:
on the raster and imagery tab -> resampling method -> change from Nearest Neighbor to Bilinear.
comments.response_text: Following your comments, we have updated all relevant items and replaced the figures with the latest screenshots produced in GIS.
comments.summary_ko: 해저 특징 이미지의 수심 색상 창이 불명확. 가시 범위 내 값으로 색상 팔레트 축소 필요(ArcGIS Stretch 설정).

comments.comment_text:
'The crest orientations observed in the MBES and SBP datasets align with these tidal directions'
Do you mean they are perpendicular?
comments.response_text: we do not mean perpendicular. Rather, the crest orientations are broadly consistent with (i.e., align with) the tidal directions. The sentence has been revised accordingly in Section 7.1
comments.summary_ko: 'MBES와 SBP에서 관측된 능선 방향이 조석 방향과 일치' — 수직(perpendicular) 방향인지 확인.

comments.comment_text: The backscatter dataset could not be found
comments.response_text: As requested, Figure 22 showing the backscatter dataset has been added to the report.

comments.comment_text: Please mention in legend why Line 33 is singled out
comments.response_text: Line 33 is highlighed as it is chosen for testing the processing flow and is presented in the report regarding the processing result from raw to final result as mentioned in 5.1.2.b
comments.summary_ko: Line 33 범례에 별도 표시된 사유 설명 필요.

comments.comment_text: The image cannot be read. Please modfy by adjusting the cor palette between 1400 and 2100m/s and make labels and scale bigger.
comments.response_text: The velocity has been displayed by adjusting the color palette to a range of 1400–2100 m/s and increasing the label size.(Figure 12)
comments.summary_ko: 그림 판독 불가. 색상 팔레트 1400-2100 m/s 범위로 조정. 라벨 및 스케일 확대.

comments.comment_text: Please add a close up to the pointed reflector to see the difference between actual and thoretical
comments.response_text: A zoomed-in image has now been inserted to clearly show the difference between the actual and theoretical results (Figure 21).
comments.summary_ko: 실측 vs 이론 반사면 차이를 보여주는 클로즈업 추가.

comments.comment_text:
As there is no available soil samples yet, please use conditional formulation to discribe stratigraphy.
E.g.: 
'filled with heterogeneous sediments ranging from coarse to fine sand, with localized clay deposition.'
->
'filled with heterogeneous sediments expected/interpreted to be  ranging from coarse to fine sand, with localized clay deposition.'
comments.response_text: Changed the lithology as interpreted on all report. Added an extra line before final table indication that the lithology is indicative
comments.summary_ko: 토양 시료 미확보 상태이므로 지층 기술 시 조건부 표현 사용. 예: 'filled with heterogeneous sediments...'.

comments.comment_text: Why is there a highlighted section on the map? Is there a missing image of this section to illustrate the aspect of the basement relector?
comments.response_text: The picture has been corrected. No line is displayed
comments.summary_ko: 지도에 강조 표시된 구간의 의미 설명. 기반암 반사면 예시 이미지 누락 여부.
